titleStmt.title: SII 23.372: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 372. (A.R. No. 372 of 1907.) Māyūram, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Mayūranāthasvāmi temple—in one of the shrines on the northern side Rājarāja III: year 14: 1229 A.D.

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Tulā, ba. 3, Sunday, Rōhiṇi, which would correspond to A.D. 1229, October 7. This registers an endowment of 500 kuḻi of land named Añjolāṉ-viḷāgam for rice offering to the goddess Tiruppaḷḷi-aṟai Nāchchiyār during the early morning service in the temple, by Araiyaṉ Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyāṉ of Porōśaikkuḍi in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, who had also consecrated the goddess. The land was exempted from the taxes like antarāyam and pāṭṭam by the aḍaippu-mudalis (?) and the mahāsabhā of the village (Nallōr-Pudukkuḍi) in which the land was situated. After offerings the rice was to be distributed among the members of the temple establishment. During the service the name of the donor was to be announced in the words “Porōśaikkuḍaiyān-Tambirāṉ has come”.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājarā
jadevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉnālāvatu tulānāyaṟṟu
Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
rohaṇi nāḷ Uṭaiyār tirumaiyilāṭutuṟai Uṭai
yār koyilil Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu po
rocaikkuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ tiruvekampamuṭai
yāṉ Eḻuntaruḷuvitta tiruppaḷḷi Aṟai nācciyār
kku tiruppaḷḷiyeḻuccik kālattu Amutu ceytaruḷa brahma
decam nallorputukkuṭiyil pālā tevarti
rumayilāṭutuṟai Uṭaiyānum Ivaṉ kkal vilai
koṇṭu viṭṭa coḻakulacuntarivatikku kiḻakku rājenti
racoḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku 3- Ām catirattu Añcolā
ṉ viḷākam Eṉṉum perāl nilam va-ṉāl kuḻi 5 100- m Ivvūr Aṭai
ppumutalikaḷum māsabhaiyum Antarāyam pāṭṭa muṭpaṭa Iṟaiyi
liyāka viṭṭamaiyil Uṭalkoṇṭu cantirātittavarai Iṟṟai
nāl mutal nāḷ Oṉṟukku nāṉāḻi Arici Arici Amutu ceytaruḷavum Ic
coṟṟile Añcolārai tiruppariyaṭṭañ cāttuṅ kaivittār
nāḻi Arici coṟupeṟavum Itu muppatu vaṭṭattu civappirā
maṇaṟke ka yākavum tiruppaḷḷi Aṟai vācalkāvalāy
niṟkum tirumeykāppāṟku nāḻiaricicoṟu peṟavum poro
caikkuṭaiyāṉ tampirāṉ vantāṉ Eṉṟu tirucciṉṉam pa
Ikkoyil ṇiuṭaiya caṭaiyaṉāṉa Ā
ceyvāṉ kkum mayilaṉāṉa cikaraṇavāc
ṉukkum I ccoṟu peṟavum Ippaṭi Iṟ
ṟaināḷmutal cantirātittavarai celvatāka tāṉattā
romuṅ kūṭa niccayittu tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai vācalil kal
kuṭutteṉ porocaikkuṭaiyāṉ tiru
vekampamuṭaiyāṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 23.372 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
